title: Prima 18M Laundry Cloth Dryer Airer Rack Washing Line Folding Outdoor Cloth Dryer
description: This impressive 18 metre clothes dryer is a fantastic product for use around the home. Portable and lightweight, folds up for easy storage, easy to use and super easy to transport wherever you need it.
